infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Simply Food Facts scans product barcodes with your camera to look up ingredients and allergens. For example, scan a cereal box to see if it contains nuts or artificial sweeteners. Photos are not saved or shared—we only use the barcode number to retrieve product information.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: This app does not use your contacts.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This app does not use your calendar.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: This app does not use your calendar.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: We need access to your microphone to record audio.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app does not use your photo library.

infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app does not use your speech recognition.
